root_causes: Drift between model_photos and models.portfolio_images with silent sync failure
getPhotosForModel applied .order() before .eq(photo_type), breaking PostgREST chain for typed fetches
Completeness used stale React state instead of model_photos
Agency roster passed raw portfolio_images URLs to StorageImage without normalize
send-invite success assumed from invoke error only; body error ignored
Image rights checkbox appeared to reset without explaining audit window
persistence_fixes: rebuildPortfolioImagesFromModelPhotos / rebuildPolaroidsFromModelPhotos + run on media panel load
getPhotosForModel: filter by photo_type before order
Alert on syncPortfolioToModel failure in panel and add-model flow
invite_dispatch_fixes: Append buildModelClaimUrl when email fails but token exists
client_visibility_fixes: ProjectDetailView: normalize portfolio URLs with model id
Agency roster: normalize cover URL; chest ?? bust in meta
manual_review_required: End-to-end agency upload → reload → client discoverability
